text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen is looming, but first...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Geez! This is the only festive thing I managed to
squeeze into my schedule, so you'd better
appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet has invited me out into town, where
many buildings are decorated with holiday lights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her reason being...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah! Look! It's starting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's going to be the race of the century at the
Nakayama Racecourse! Who will be crowned this
year's strongest Umamusume?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Coming in at the top of the polls is Daiwa Scarlet!
Watch the Scarlet Queen take to the track...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A special Arima Kinen commercial is airing today,
in this town only.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Top of the polls, huh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I haven't felt pressure for years.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I just want to set foot on the track already. I'll
outrun anyone there.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll burn myself into everyone's minds—Daiwa
Scarlet, the number one racer.
choice_data_list: I know you can do it.
I know you can do it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You're right. I've got this in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, I don't have anything else planned. I
suppose we should head back to the academy...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Can we stop by a flower shop?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah. The winner always gets flowers, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So I figured I should tell you in advance what kind
of flowers I like.
choice_data_list: You want me to prepare flowers?
You want me to prepare flowers?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Who else?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, I'm kidding. I won't get my hopes up.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But just for the record, I like magnolias. They're
so beautiful and white.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I love how they bloom skywards in spring. Higher
and higher, as if reaching toward the heavens.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A lot like me, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accompany Daiwa Scarlet as she goes to look at
her favorite flowers.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Here.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It's been pretty cold recently, so I got you a scarf.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I went to the trouble of picking out a really warm
one, so make sure you use it, okay?
choice_data_list: Is this a present? For me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It's just a precaution, idiot. Pre-cau-tion.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What if you got sick on the day of the race?
You'd be a laughing stock.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And you'd miss me taking first place at the Arima
Kinen, too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Good. I don't want any trouble.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to waste Daiwa Scarlet's gift, so I put
the scarf on right away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It keeps me warm all the way home.
